utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All five appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan provides both components with descriptions and individual costs plus a total; this is fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Provided with plan name, description 'Home Contents Insurance', and cost; fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Provided with plan, description, and cost; fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Provided with plan, description, and cost; fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided only with monthly total and a note; annual cost is missing, so not fully specified as a complete monthly/annual breakdown.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four items: LifeFirst Standard Plan for health (physical and mental), LifeFirst Standard Coverage for property (home contents), PrimeTravel Premium Plan for travel, and a Photography & Adventure Enhancement Add-on (not present in the ground-truth ratings). From the ground-truth: LifeFirst Standard Plan has ratings under both physical health (rating 9) and mental health (rating 4). LifeFirst Standard Coverage under home_content has rating 9. PrimeTravel Premium Plan under travel_insurance has rating 3. The Photography & Adventure Enhancement Add-on does not exist in the ground-truth list, so it cannot be mapped and should be omitted from RATINGS.
